name: activity
description: Classify pane activity by diffing peek snapshots.

cli.help: maw activity <pane> [--watch] [--json] [--stuck-only] [--window=<dur>] [--samples=N] [--sampler=peek|follow] | maw activity --all [--watch] [--json] [--stuck-only] [--window=<dur>] [--samples=N] [--sampler=peek|follow] - classify pane output as busy, idle, or stuck
